data.body: 2bbd validation milestone: visible happy oracle RED then GREEN; initial held-out suite 22/22 GREEN on first run. Under-lock callback defect-seeded mutation made both transaction and lifecycle race tests RED, restored to GREEN. Code review found a zero-network gap: CLOSE validity entered ensure_fresh. Added a behavioral RED oracle, redispatched same standard tier once, then simplified to one ContextVar-based local_read_context at the canonical ensure_fresh boundary; signature, own-material, and related-pin reads are now locally scoped without changing default readers or full signing/attest modules. Final focused suite 167/167 GREEN and make check PASS. Broad xdist run: 6920 passed, 28 skipped, one pre-existing schema-test contradiction; tracked/claimed as e833-965d-13de-43a2 and fixed RED->GREEN with a required-field negative control.
